name: Ely Gold Royalties Inc.
description: Ely Gold Royalties Inc. is a Vancouver-based royalty company focused on gold and silver properties in the Western United States, primarily in Nevada. The company operates a business model focused on acquiring and generating precious metals royalties, providing investors with low-risk leverage to gold and silver prices. Ely Gold's portfolio includes producing royalties, development-stage assets, and exploration properties, which are managed by major and mid-tier operators.
